meaning: n.虚弱,脆弱,意志薄弱,过失,品德上的弱点
examples: Increasing frailty meant that she was more and more confined to bed.
This human frailty has profound consequences.
Your frailty makes them wary of buying anything from you.
There is some hilarious writing, but always with a tenderness for the frailty of the old.
Many of the post-game questions about the Dutch performance will focus on a defensive frailty.
